zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Scrope於大約1321年出生時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey le Scrope42歲，母親Ivetta De Ros Scrope37歲。他和Isabella至少有1個女兒。他去世於1359年之後。

zh-hans.Ghent, Arrondissement Gent, East Flander: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Scrope于大约1321年出生时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey le Scrope42岁，母亲Ivetta De Ros Scrope37岁。他和Isabella至少有1个女儿。他去世于1359年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Scrope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: of uncertain origin. Tengvik suggests derivation from the Old Scandinavian personal name Skrópi (of doubtful etymology, but compare Old Scandinavian skrópa-maðr ‘hypocrite’, containing the genitive plural form of skrópar ‘sham, hypocrisy’). It is possible, but not certain, that this personal name forms the first element of the Notts place-name Scrooby. Otherwise there is no evidence for its currency in England or, more relevantly, in Normandy. Richards Castle (in Herefs and Shrops) was apparently named after Richard Scrope, who held estates in Herefs and Worcs in 1066 and was a Norman favourite of Edward the Confessor. The Scrope family, whose name is traditionally pronounced /skru:p/, was politically important in medieval England, and acquired estates in Lincs (Barton on Humber), NR Yorks (Castle Bolton), and in ER Yorks (Flotmanby). Richard (le) Scrope of Bolton, in Wensleydale, was Lord Chancellor in the reign of Richard II. The use of le and de in the surname, suggesting either a nickname or a locative name, must be treated with caution because these were often added gratuitously to Anglo-Norman surnames as a sign of high social status.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Scrope was born about 1321, his father, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, was 42 and his mother, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, was 37. He had at least 1 daughter with Isabella. He died after 1359.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Scrope est né environ 1321, son père, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Isabella. Il est décédé après 1359.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Scrope um 1321 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey le Scrope 42 und seine Mutter Ivetta De Ros Scrope 37. Er hatte mit Isabella mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1359.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Scrope è nato il circa 1321, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Isabella. Morì dopo il 1359.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Scropeが約1321年に生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey le Scropeは42歳，母Ivetta De Ros Scropeは37歳であった。彼はIsabellaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1359年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Scrope(이)가 대략 1321년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey le Scrope(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Ivetta De Ros Scrope(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Isabella(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Scrope nasceu aproximadamente 1321, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Isabella. Ele faleceu após 1359.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Scrope родился около 1321 г., его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey le Scrope было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Ivetta De Ros Scrope, 37. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Isabella. Он умер после 1359 г.

sm.about 1321–Aft 1359: e tusa o le 1321–ina ua ma'ea le 1359

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen Scrope nació aproximadamente 1321, su papá, Sir Geoffrey le Scrope, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Ivetta De Ros Scrope, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Isabella. Murió después de 1359.
